inputs.label: Scale Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance from nut to bridge (vibrating string length)

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from nut to bridge (vibrating string length)
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand von Sattel zu Steg (schwingende Saitenlänge)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance du sillet de tête au chevalet (longueur vibrante de la corde)
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde la cejilla al puente (longitud vibrante de la cuerda)

inputs.label: String Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the string (e.g., 0.010 inch ≈ 0.254 mm)

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the string (e.g., 0.010 inch ≈ 0.254 mm)
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser der Saite (z. B. 0,010 Zoll ≈ 0,254 mm)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de la corde (ex. 0,010 pouce ≈ 0,254 mm)
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro de la cuerda (ej., 0.010 pulgadas ≈ 0.254 mm)

inputs.label: Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of string material (steel ≈ 7850 kg/m³, nickel ≈ 8900 kg/m³)

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of string material (steel ≈ 7850 kg/m³, nickel ≈ 8900 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tel malzemesi yoğunluğu (çelik ≈ 7850 kg/m³, nikel ≈ 8900 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Saitenmaterials (Stahl ≈ 7850 kg/m³, Nickel ≈ 8900 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du matériau de la corde (acier ≈ 7850 kg/m³, nickel ≈ 8900 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del material de la cuerda (acero ≈ 7850 kg/m³, níquel ≈ 8900 kg/m³)

inputs.label: Target Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Desired pitch frequency (e.g., E4 = 329.63 Hz for high E string)

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired pitch frequency (e.g., E4 = 329.63 Hz for high E string)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen perde frekansı (örn. yüksek E teli için E4 = 329.63 Hz)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Tonfrequenz (z. B. E4 = 329,63 Hz für hohe E-Saite)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence de hauteur désirée (ex. Mi4 = 329,63 Hz pour la corde mi aigu)
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia de tono deseada (ej., E4 = 329.63 Hz para la cuerda Mi aguda)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
